sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52985" key="ka/mma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κάμμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">κάπτω</etym>) <sense id="n52985.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">that which is supped up</tr_>, in pl., <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ψαιστά</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1534.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nicocl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">καμματίδες</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
